# IndoorPlant.in
> Indian e-commerce store selling curated indoor plants (from Rs 299) with pan-India
> damage-protected delivery, a free AI plant advisor, and expert care guides written
> specifically for Indian homes, apartments, and climate conditions.

## Shop
- [All Plants](https://www.indoorplant.in/shop): Full catalog of indoor plants with live prices, starting at Rs 299
- [AI Plant Advisor](https://www.indoorplant.in/ai-advisor): Free tool that matches plants to a user's room, light conditions, and lifestyle in under a minute
- [Air Purifying Plants](https://www.indoorplant.in/shop/air-purifying-plants): Plants that improve indoor air quality
- [Low Maintenance Plants](https://www.indoorplant.in/shop/low-maintenance-plants): Beginner-friendly plants that tolerate neglect
- [Pet-Friendly Plants](https://www.indoorplant.in/shop/pet-friendly-plants): Plants safe for homes with cats and dogs
- [Bedroom Plants](https://www.indoorplant.in/shop/bedroom-plants): Plants suited to bedroom light and conditions
- [Free Plant Gift](https://www.indoorplant.in/free-plants): Free plant offer details

## Popular Plants
- [N'Joy Money Plant](https://www.indoorplant.in/product/njoy-money-plant): Compact white-and-green variegated money plant, Rs 299, easy care, not pet safe
- [Golden Money Plant](https://www.indoorplant.in/product/golden-money-plant): India's most popular good-luck plant, thrives in low to bright indirect light
- [Lucky Jade Plant](https://www.indoorplant.in/product/lucky-jade-plant): Hardy succulent for forgetful waterers, pet safe, needs a sunny windowsill
- [Bamboo Palm Plant](https://www.indoorplant.in/product/bamboo-palm-plant): Air-purifying, pet-safe floor palm that grows 4-5 feet, fills room corners
- [Monstera Broken Heart](https://www.indoorplant.in/product/monstera-broken-heart): Compact climbing monstera with split leaves
- [Aglaonema Red Lipstick](https://www.indoorplant.in/product/aglaonema-red-lipstick-plant): Pet-safe plant that holds its red leaf margins even in low-light rooms
- [Aglaonema Snow White](https://www.indoorplant.in/product/aglaonema-snow-white-plant): Pet-safe, low-light plant with cream and pale green leaves

## Guides
- [Best Indoor Plants for Renters in India](https://www.indoorplant.in/blog/best-indoor-plants-for-renters-india): Six plants for rented Indian flats with real prices, placement advice, and moving tips
- [Indoor Plants for Rented Apartments](https://www.indoorplant.in/blog/indoor-plants-for-rented-apartments-india): Plants that work without drilling or landlord permission
- [How to Buy Indoor Plants Online in India](https://www.indoorplant.in/blog/how-to-buy-indoor-plants-online-india): What to check before ordering and what to do on day one
- [Cheap Indoor Plants Under Rs 500](https://www.indoorplant.in/blog/cheap-indoor-plants-online-india-under-500): Budget plants that look good and stay alive
- [Best Time of Year to Buy Plants Online in India](https://www.indoorplant.in/blog/best-time-buy-plants-online-india): Why October-February is ideal and monsoon is risky for plant delivery
- [Decorative Plants for Your Home Online](https://www.indoorplant.in/blog/decorative-plants-for-home-online-india): Eight decorative plants suited to Indian apartments
- [Which Plant Sites Are Worth It in 2026](https://www.indoorplant.in/blog/buy-indoor-plants-online-india-which-site-2026): Honest comparison of Indian online plant stores
- [All Care Guides & Blog](https://www.indoorplant.in/blog): Full library of plant care and buying guides

## Key Facts
- Indoor plants start at Rs 299 with free delivery on qualifying orders across India
- Every plant ships in ventilated, damage-protected packaging designed for Indian transit conditions
- The free AI Plant Advisor recommends plants based on room, light, and lifestyle
- Damage claims: email photos and order number to support@indoorplant.in within the return window stated on the returns page
- Contact: support@indoorplant.in | +91 70035 87996
- Social: https://www.instagram.com/indoorplant_in
